news.title: Paolo Cherchi, distinguished Romance philologist and devoted teacher, 1937-2026
news.summary_en: A scholar of extraordinary range, Cherchi guided generations of UChicago students with rigor, curiosity and care

UChicago will offer free tuition for families with incomes below $250,000, greatly expanding undergraduate aid
news.summary_en: Starting in Autumn 2027, initiative covers tuition, fees, housing and meals for families with incomes below $125,000, dramatically increasing access to a transformative UChicago education

news.title: New UChicago digital research tool opens paths connecting cultures and continents
news.summary_en: Maps of Chicago, Guerrilla Television, Middle East photographs, and more are connected with metadata to power research
